form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up finished third of 7 runners at Southwell on February 2 over 3200m, 17 len behind Daytime Dreaming with 74.5kg at $6. Second-up finished third in a small field at Bangor-On-Dee on February 25 over 4100m, on slow going 36 len behind Bowenspark with 73kg at $6. Might find this a bit too tough.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after four months pulled up at Wetherby on March 27 over 3000m. Previously second-up didn't finish the race at Newbury on November 28 over 3300m. Hard to fault on his best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Racing second-up today. Fresh up after four months pulled up at Wetherby on March 27 over 3000m. Previously second-up didn't finish the race at Newbury on November 28 over 3300m. Hard to fault on his best form.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last start finished third in a small field at this track on March 15 over 3900m, on slow going 20 len behind Jaipaletemps with 74kg at $13. At only start last preparation finished sixth of 11 runners at Cheltenham on November 16 over 3200m, slow track; 20 len behind Triple Trade with 65.5kg at $9.50. Despite latest effort others rate stronger this time.

form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after five months finished second in a small field at Doncaster on March 13 over 3800m, 29 len behind Cuban Court with 72.5kg at $5.50. Previously second-up finished third in a small field at Stratford-On-Avon on June 17 over 3750m, 6 len behind Sergeant Fury with 68.5kg at $26. Definite threat.

form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after four months finished second in a small field at Kempton Park on March 23 over 3600m, 1.5 len behind Southoftheborder with 70kg at $4.50. Previously second-up won by 1.0 len Wetherby on November 1 over 3900m defeating Strong Foundations carrying 66kg at $7.50 in a steeplechase. Can improve on first up performance. Fitter and looks tough to beat.

form.formComment: Last run won by 1.5 len Bangor-On-Dee on March 21 over 3500m defeating Epinephrine with 71kg at $5 in a steeplechase. Race before finished fifth in a small field at Ffos Las on March 1 over 3900m, in the wet; 57 len behind Arctic Conditions with 72.5kg at $3.50. Only needs to jump well to be right in the finish.
